metadata.description: Promote v1.2.0 — 2 entry points (strategist + content-batcher) backed by 37 internal expert prompts (operators, frameworks, personas) for zero system-prompt pollution. Two-pass orchestration: channels proposed actively (organic + paid), 17 world-class operators consulted in strategic mode then production mode. 14 days concrete content + 76 days outlines convertible on demand via content-batcher.

plugins.name: promote
plugins.description: v1.2.0 BREAKING — Only 2 skills exposed (promote-strategist + promote-content-batcher). 37 internal expert prompts under prompts/ invoked via Read+Task tool (operators: Welsh, McGarry, Lenny, Ferriss, Robinson, Isenberg, Johnson, Indig, Hormozi-shortform, Gerhardt, Faris, Wilcox, Ryan-PMax, Vallaeys, Seufert, Sanchez, Curry; personas: Hormozi, Schwartz, Holiday, Ammar, Paul Graham, X-Mastery, MrBeast, Steve Jobs; frameworks: JTBD, Dunford, Cialdini, Voss, Four-Fits, PLG, GEO, AI-Content; tactical: customer-research, pricing). Coverage: organic + paid channels, content production 14d + on-demand batching.
